meta_description: Released: September 2024, Warhammer-Community.
content: Optional RuleBattle Traits are optional rules that add additional flavour to a warband. All fighters must share this runemark to be eligible.There are also Battle Traits for each Grand Alliance. Trait RunemarkTraitStormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct ChamberStormcast Eternals: Thunderstrike StormcastsStormcast Eternals: Vanguard Auxiliary ChamberStormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberStormcast EternalsScions of the Storm: After deployment, you can pick a friendly fighter with this battle trait. If that fighter is on the battlefield, remove them from the battlefield. At the start of the second battle round onwards, starting with the attacker, you can place that fighter on the battlefield more than 5” from each enemy fighter and more than 3” from each objective and treasure token.

meta_description: Released: September 2024, Warhammer-Community.
content: RunemarkReactionfactions-order-stormcast-eternals-ruinationAncient Aura: A fighter can make this reaction when an enemy fighter within 6" of them uses an ability. Roll a dice. Add 2 to the roll if this fighter has a Memorian token, then remove that token. If the roll equals or exceeds the value of that ability, that ability has no effect.

meta_description: Released: September 2024, Warhammer-Community.
Released: September 2024, Warhammer-Community.
content: RunemarkAbilityfactions-order-stormcast-eternals-ruination[Double] Lightning-scoured Soul: This fighter gains a number of ruination dice equal to the value of this ability for the rest of the battle round. Each time this fighter is allocated a damage point, you can roll 1 of their ruination dice. On a 3+, that damage point is not allocated to this fighter.factions-order-stormcast-eternals-ruinationChampion[Double] Through Darkened Skies: Remove this fighter from the battlefield, then set them up on a platform or the battlefield floor, more than 5" from all enemy fighters.factions-order-stormcast-eternals-ruinationTerrifying[Double] Memories of Past Glories: You can give this fighter 1 Memorian token, to a maximum of 1. Until the end of their activation, add 1 to the Move characteristic of this fighter and add half the value of this ability (rounding up) to the Strength characteristics of melee attack actions made by this fighter.factions-order-stormcast-eternals-ruinationMystic[Triple] Sense Unholy Sorcery: For the rest of the battle round, the value of abilities used by enemy f ighters within a number of inches of this fighter equal to the value of this ability is 1. If there is a friendly Gryph-crow within 6" of this fighter, the range of this ability is battlefield-wide.factions-order-stormcast-eternals-ruinationDestroyer[Triple] Earn an Honourable Death: You can give this fighter 1 Memorian token, to a maximum of 1. Pick one or more friendly fighters with the Ruination Chamber (factions-order-stormcast-eternals-ruination) runemark that each have 5 or more damage points allocated to them and are visible to this fighter. Those friendly fighters can each make a bonus attack action.factions-order-stormcast-eternals-ruinationIcon Bearer[Triple] Blazing Lantern: For the rest of the battle round, critical hits for attacks made by enemy f ighters visible to this fighter and within a number of inches of this fighter equal to the value of this ability become hits instead.factions-order-stormcast-eternals-ruinationMount[Quad] Deliver Judgement: Pick a visible friendly fighter with the Ruination Chamber (factions-order-stormcast-eternals-ruination) runemark that has activated this battle round and that is within 6" of this fighter. You cannot pick a fighter with the Hero (Hero) runemark. That fighter can be activated once more later in this combat phase.

content: RunemarkAbilityThe EmberwatchBerserker[Double] Quiver of Tricks: Pick 1 of the following effects: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 12" of this fighter. Subtract 1 from that fighter’s Move characteristic for the rest of the battle round. Pick an objective within 12" of this fighter. The first time this battle round that an enemy fighter ends a move action within 3" of that objective, allocate D3 damage points to them as a reaction.The EmberwatchHero[Triple] Your Duty Remains Undone, Farasa!: Pick a friendly fighter with the Emberwatch (The Emberwatch) and Champion (Champion) runemarks that has been taken down, then roll a number of dice equal to the value of this ability. On any rolls of 3+: • Set up that fighter on a platform or the battlefield floor, more than 6" from all enemy fighters. The fighter set up on the battlefield no longer counts as being taken down. Remove a number of damage points allocated to that fighter equal to the number of rolls of 3+ that were made.The Emberwatch[Quad] The Raptors of Sigmar: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter to be the target. Roll a D6 for each damage point allocated to that target. For each roll of 3+, allocate 1 damage point to the target. Add 1 to each roll if this fighter has the Hero (Hero) runemark.

content: Optional RuleBattle Traits are optional rules that add additional flavour to a warband. All fighters must share this runemark to be eligible.There are also Battle Traits for each Grand Alliance. Trait RunemarkTraitOgor MawtribesOgor MawtribesFriendly fighters with this battle trait and the Brute (Brute) or Agile (Agile) runemarks can make the following action: Devour Corpse: Pick an enemy fighter that is taken down and roll a dice. Remove a number of damage points from this fighter equal to the roll. An enemy fighter cannot be picked as the target of this action more than once per battle.

meta_description: A warband of ogors is a gathering of ravenous bullies who take a brutish delight in exerting their strength over
content: RunemarkReactionOgor MawtribesBruteQuick Bite: A fighter can make this reaction after they are targeted by a melee attack action but before the hit rolls are made. If none of the hit rolls from that attack action result in a critical hit, allocate 3 damage points to the attacking fighter, and remove up to 3 damage points allocated to this fighter.

meta_description: A warband of ogors is a gathering of ravenous bullies who take a brutish delight in exerting their strength over
A warband of ogors is a gathering of ravenous bullies who take a brutish delight in exerting their strength over
content: RunemarkAbilityOgor MawtribesBrute[Double] On the Mawpath: Add 3 to this fighter's Move characteristic for their next move action in this activation.Ogor MawtribesAgile[Double] Bounding Leaps: A fighter can only use this ability if there is a visible enemy fighter within 6" of them. This fighter makes a bonus move action and must finish closer to the closest visible enemy fighter than they were at the start of that move action.Ogor MawtribesBulwark[Double] Ironfist: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter and roll 2 dice. For each roll of 3-5, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. For each roll of 6, allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.Ogor MawtribesTrapper[Double] Sneaky Traps: Until the end of the battle round, each time an enemy fighter finishes a move action within 3" of this fighter, that fighter suffers impact damage.Ogor MawtribesBrute[Triple] Bullcharge: Until the end of this fighter's activation, the next time this fighter finishes a move action within 1" of an enemy fighter, pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter. Allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.Ogor MawtribesDestroyer[Quad] Thunderous Blast of Hot Metal: Add 3 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the next missile attack action made by this fighter this activation.

meta_description: A warband of ogors is a gathering of ravenous bullies who take a brutish delight in exerting their strength over
content: RunemarkAbilityOgor MawtribesHero[Double] Might Makes Right: A fighter can only use this ability if an enemy fighter has been taken down by an attack action made by them this activation. This fighter makes a bonus move action or a bonus attack action.Ogor MawtribesHeroScout[Double] Lead the Skal: Pick a visible friendly fighter with the Beast (Beast) runemark within 4" of this fighter. That friendly fighter makes a bonus attack action.Ogor MawtribesHeroMystic[Double] Bloodgruel: Remove a number of damage points from this fighter up to the value of this ability.Ogor MawtribesHeroChampion[Triple] Bully of the First Degree: Pick a visible friendly fighter within 2" of this fighter. Allocate a number of damage points to that friendly fighter equal to half the value of this ability (rounding up). Then, that friendly fighter makes a bonus move action or a bonus attack action.Ogor MawtribesFerocious[Triple] Haul Em In: This fighter makes a bonus attack action. After that attack action, the target of that attack action makes a bonus move action directly towards this fighter, as if they were jumping, a number of inches equal to the value of this ability. When doing so, they can move away from enemy fighters within 1" at the start of that move action.Ogor MawtribesHeroFrenzied[Quad] Fire Breath: Allocate a number of damage points equal to the value of this ability to all visible enemy fighters within 3" of this fighter.

meta_description: A warband of ogors is a gathering of ravenous bullies who take a brutish delight in exerting their strength over
content: RunemarkAbilityHrothgorn's MantrappersTrapper[Double] Lay Mantrap: A fighter can only use this ability once per battle. Pick a point on a platform or the battlefield floor within 3" of this fighter that is more than 1" away from all enemy fighters and set up the Bushwakka's Trap marker. Allocate 2D6 damage points to the first enemy fighter to move within 1" of the marker, then remove the marker.Hrothgorn's MantrappersMinion[Triple] Here You Go, Boss!: A fighter can use this ability only if they are within 2" of a friendly Hrothgorn Mantrapper. That Hrothgorn Mantrapper makes a bonus attack action that has a Ranged Weapon runemark (Ranged).

That fighter can make a bonus move action or a bonus attack action.Blackpowder's BuccaneersScout[Double] Sic 'Em: Pick a visible friendly fighter within 6" of this fighter that has both the Blackpowder's Buccaneers (Blackpowder's Buccaneers) and the Frenzied (Frenzied) runemarks. meta_description: A warband of ogors is a gathering of ravenous bullies who take a brutish delight in exerting their strength over
content: Hrothgorn is a particularly foul-tempered and cruel Icebrow Hunter with a keen nose for fresh meat, who favours snaring his prey with a crossbow-launched mantrap that shatters bones with its iron jaws. He tolerates the constant jabbering and bickering of his gnoblar companions only because they are useful for carrying weapons, setting trap triggers and carrying out whatever tasks the Icebrow Hunter considers beneath him. Bladeborn fightersHrothgorn's Mantrappers are from Warhammer Underworlds, so adhere to Bladeborn rules.

content: Gorlok Blackpowder seeks to make a name for himself so big that every ogor will know it. Having chosen piracy to help him achieve this aim, he's gathered a larcenous crew about himself, and he intends to strip the Mortal Realms of their riches. Bladeborn fightersBlackpowder's Buccaneers are from Warhammer Underworlds, so adhere to Bladeborn rules.

meta_description: The warrior-mystics of the Sacrosanct chambers are masters of the arcane arts, wielding the power of the celestial
content: Optional RuleBattle Traits are optional rules that add additional flavour to a warband. All fighters must share this runemark to be eligible.There are also Battle Traits for each Grand Alliance. Trait RunemarkTraitStormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct ChamberStormcast Eternals: Thunderstrike StormcastsStormcast Eternals: Vanguard Auxiliary ChamberStormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberStormcast EternalsScions of the Storm: After deployment, you can pick a friendly fighter with this battle trait. If that fighter is on the battlefield, remove them from the battlefield. At the start of the second battle round onwards, starting with the attacker, you can place that fighter on the battlefield more than 5” from each enemy fighter and more than 3” from each objective and treasure token.

meta_description: The warrior-mystics of the Sacrosanct chambers are masters of the arcane arts, wielding the power of the celestial
content: RunemarkReactionStormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct ChamberThunderous Departure: A fighter can make this reaction when they are targeted by a melee attack action, after the damage is totalled but before it is allocated to this fighter, if it is enough for this fighter to be taken down. Allocate D6 damage points to their attacker. Fighters with the Beast (Beast) runemark or both the Scout (Scout) and Fly (Fly) runemarks cannot make this reaction.

meta_description: The warrior-mystics of the Sacrosanct chambers are masters of the arcane arts, wielding the power of the celestial
The warrior-mystics of the Sacrosanct chambers are masters of the arcane arts, wielding the power of the celestial
content: RunemarkAbilityStormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct Chamber[Double] Channelled Empowerment: Add the value of this ability to the Strength characteristic of the next melee attack action made by this fighter in this activation. Fighters with the Beast (Beast) runemark cannot use this ability.Stormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct ChamberMystic[Double] Summon Celestial Lightning: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter and roll a number of dice equal to the value of this ability. For each roll of 4+, allocate 1 damage point to that enemy fighter.Stormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct ChamberDestroyer[Triple] Burst of Celestial Lightning: Add half the value of this ability (rounding up) to the damage points allocated to enemy fighters by each hit and critical hit from the next missile attack action made by this fighter this activation.Stormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct ChamberBeast[Triple] Darting Attack: This fighter makes a bonus attack action. Then, they can make a bonus disengage action.Stormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct ChamberBulwark[Triple] Soul-shield Channelling: Until the end of the battle round, count each critical hit from attack actions that target this fighter as a hit instead.Stormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct ChamberFerocious[Quad] Thunderous Pounce: Until the end of this fighter's activation, the next time this fighter finishes a move action within 1" of an enemy fighter, pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter. Allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to double the value of this ability

meta_description: The warrior-mystics of the Sacrosanct chambers are masters of the arcane arts, wielding the power of the celestial
content: RunemarkAbilityStormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct ChamberHero[Double] Cleanse the Realms of Taint: A fighter can only use this ability if an enemy fighter has been taken down by an attack action made by them this activation. This fighter makes a bonus move action or a bonus attack action.Stormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct ChamberHeroBrute[Double] Meteoric Slam: Until the end of this fighter's activation, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee attack actions made by this fighter.Stormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct ChamberHeroBerserker[Triple] Shatter Spirit Flask: Allocate a number of damage points equal to the value of this ability to this fighter and to all visible fighters within 3" of this fighter.Stormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct ChamberHeroFrenzied[Quad] Open Redemption Cache: Allocate a number of damage points equal to the value of this ability to all visible enemy fighters within 3" of this fighter.

meta_description: The warrior-mystics of the Sacrosanct chambers are masters of the arcane arts, wielding the power of the celestial
content: RunemarkAbilityStormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct ChamberStormsire's CursebreakersHero[Triple] Storm of Eldritch Lightning: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 9" of this fighter and roll a number of dice equal to the value of this ability. For each 3+, allocate 3 damage points to that fighter.

content: A specialist in the breaking of curses and the sundering of dark enchantments, Stormsire is one of the God-King's most trusted arcane agents. In his service, the Evocators Ammis and Rastus have journeyed to some of the darkest and most unhallowed corners of the Mortal Realms, striking down their enemies with the crackling magic of Azyr. Bladeborn fightersStormsire's Cursebreakers are from Warhammer Underworlds, so adhere to Bladeborn rules.

meta_description: Released: November 2022, Sundered Fate boxed set.
content: Optional RuleBattle Traits are optional rules that add additional flavour to a warband. All fighters must share this runemark to be eligible.There are also Battle Traits for each Grand Alliance. Trait RunemarkTraitHunters of HuanchiHunters of HuanchiHidden Hunters: After deployment, each player whose warband has this battle trait can pick a friendly fighter with this battle trait from each friendly battle group that is on the battlefield. One at a time, remove those fighters from the battlefield and pick a different battle group. Then deploy that fighter as if it were part of that battle group.

meta_description: Released: November 2022, Sundered Fate boxed set.
content: RunemarkReactionHunters of HuanchiAgileSlippery: A fighter can make this reaction after they have been allocated the total damage points by a melee attack action. T his fighter makes a bonus disengage action.

meta_description: Released: November 2022, Sundered Fate boxed set.
content: RunemarkAbilityHunters of HuanchiAgile[Double] Agile Climbers: Until the end of this fighter's activation, do not count the vertical distance moved when this fighter is climbing.Hunters of HuanchiAgile[Double] Envenomed Weapons: Add 1 to the damage points allocated by each hit and critical hit from the next attack action made by this fighter thls activation.Hunters of HuanchiTrapper[Triple] Hurled Bolas: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 8" of this fighter and roll a number of dice equal to the value of this ability. If 1 of the dice scores a 6, that fighter makes 1 fewer action in this battle round (to a minimum of 0). If a fighter is reduced to 0 actions in this way, that fighter cannot be activated in this battle round.Hunters of HuanchiIcon Bearer[Triple] Bellow of the Carnosaur: Pick an enemy fighter within 6" of this fighter. Until the end of the battle round, subtract 1 from the Move characteristic of that fighter (to a minimum of I) and subtract 1 from the damage points allocated by each hit and critical hit from attack actions made by that fighter (to a minimum of 1).Hunters of HuanchiScout[Triple] Call of the Hunt: Pick a friendly fighter with the Hunters of Huanchi (Hunters of Huanchi) and Beast (Beast) runemarks within 9" of this fighter. That fighter makes a bonus move action. Then pick a visible enemy fighter within I" of the fighter that made the bonus move action and allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.Hunters of HuanchiAgile[Quad] Hit and Run: This fighter makes a bonus move action or a bonus disengage action, then this fighter makes a bonus attack action or a bonus move action.

meta_description: Released: November 2022, Sundered Fate boxed set.
content: infoThe Hunters of Huanchi box contains: 1x Chameleon Skink Alpha. This miniature can alternatively be built as a Chameleon Skink. Either can be armed with a dartpipe or a shield and either a moonstone club or starstone bolas 1x Huanchi's Claw. This miniature can alternatively be built as a Chameleon Skink with dartpipe. 1x Hornblower, armed with a moonstone club or a dartpipe. This miniature can alternatively be built as a Chameleon Skink with dartpipe 4x Chameleon Skinks with dartpipes, who can alternatively be equipped with shields and either moonstone clubs or starstone bolas 3x Chameleon Skinks with dartpipes 3x Terrawings

content: Q: Can a fighter make the ‘Slippery' (Hunters of Huanchi) or ‘Smart Step Backwards' (Wildercorps Hunters) reaction to disengage if they are not within 1" of an enemy fighter? A: No.

meta_description: The Sylvaneth way of war is fluid and wild: the fury of a storm rushing through a tree's branches. Bolstered by the
content: Optional RuleBattle Traits are optional rules that add additional flavour to a warband. All fighters must share this runemark to be eligible.There are also Battle Traits for each Grand Alliance. Trait RunemarkTraitSylvanethSylvanethSpirit Pathways: Once per battle, a friendly fighter with this battle trait can use the 'Walk The Spirit Paths' ability without needing or spending any ability dice, and can use this ability as if they had the Warrior (Warrior) runemark.

meta_description: The Sylvaneth way of war is fluid and wild: the fury of a storm rushing through a tree's branches. Bolstered by the
content: RunemarkReactionSylvanethVengeful Spites: A fighter can make this reaction after they are targeted by a melee attack action but before the hit rolls are made. For each hit roll from that attack action that hits, allocate 1 damage point to the attacking fighter. For each critical hit, allocate 2 damage points to the attacking fighter instead.

meta_description: The Sylvaneth way of war is fluid and wild: the fury of a storm rushing through a tree's branches. Bolstered by the
The Sylvaneth way of war is fluid and wild: the fury of a storm rushing through a tree's branches. Bolstered by the
content: RunemarkAbilitySylvaneth[Double] Draw from the Spirit-song: Remove a number of damage points allocated to this fighter up to the value of this ability.SylvanethTrapper[Double] Larval Shafts: Add half the value of this ability (rounding up) to the Strength characteristic of the next missile attack action made by this fighter in this activation.SylvanethTerrifying[Double] Shrieking Terror: Pick a visible enemy fighter within a number of inches of this fighter equal to the value of this ability and roll a dice. On a roll of 3+, until the end of the battle round, that fighter cannot make move actions or disengage actions.SylvanethScout[Triple] Enrapturing Song: Pick a visible enemy fighter within a number of inches of this fighter equal to the value of this ability. Until the end of the battle round, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of attack actions made by friendly fighters with both the Sylvaneth (Sylvaneth) faction runemark and the Scout (Scout) runemark that target that fighter.SylvanethWarrior[Triple] Walk the Spirit Paths: Remove this fighter from the battlefield and set them up anywhere on the battlefield floor more than 5" from any enemy fighters.SylvanethSentience[Quad] Thrumming with Life: A fighter can only use this ability if an enemy fighter has been taken down by an attack action made by them this activation. Remove up to 10 damage points allocated to this fighter.

meta_description: The Sylvaneth way of war is fluid and wild: the fury of a storm rushing through a tree's branches. Bolstered by the
content: RunemarkAbilitySylvanethHeroDestroyer[Double] Zephyrspite's Tail Pincers: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter and roll a dice. On a roll of 3+, allocate 3 damage points to that fighter.SylvanethHeroMystic[Double] Swarm of Spites: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 6" of this fighter and roll a number of dice equal to the value of this ability. For each roll of 4+, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter.SylvanethHeroBerserker[Triple] Blessing of the Forest: Remove up to D3 damage points allocated to each friendly fighter within 6" of this fighter (roll for each).SylvanethHeroDestroyer[Triple] Call to Battle: Until the end of the battle round, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee attack actions made by visible friendly fighters while they are within 6" of this fighter.SylvanethHero[Quad] Envoy of the Everqueen: Until the end of the battle round, add half the value of this ability (rounding up) to the Toughness and Strength characteristics of friendly fighters while they are within 6" of this fighter.

meta_description: The Sylvaneth way of war is fluid and wild: the fury of a storm rushing through a tree's branches. Bolstered by the
content: RunemarkAbilityYlthari's Guardians[Double] Vigour and Wrath: Until the end of this fighter's activation, add 1 to the damage points allocated by each critical hit from attack actions made by this fighter.Ylthari's GuardiansHero[Quad] The Reaping: Roll a dice for each visible enemy fighter within 6" of this fighter. On a 2+, allocate a number of damage points equal to the value of this ability to the fighter being rolled for.

meta_description: The Sylvaneth way of war is fluid and wild: the fury of a storm rushing through a tree's branches. Bolstered by the
content: RunemarkAbilitySkaeth's Wild HuntBulwark[Triple] Might of Kurnoth: Until the end of the battle round, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of attack actions that have a Range characteristic of 3 or less made by friendly fighters while they are within 6" of this fighter.

meta_description: The Sylvaneth way of war is fluid and wild: the fury of a storm rushing through a tree's branches. Bolstered by the
content: RunemarkAbilityKurnoth's HeraldsHeroMystic[Double] The Endless Hunt: For the rest of the battle round, if this fighter makes a bonus move action as a result of the ‘Herald’s Pride’ or ‘Precision Volley’ ability, they can move 6" instead of 3" and they can pass through enemy fighters when they do so.Kurnoth's HeraldsBrute[Double] Herald’s Pride: Another friendly fighter with the Heralds of Kurnoth (Kurnoth's Heralds) runemark can make a bonus move action of 3". Then, if the next melee attack action made by this fighter this activation scores any hits or critical hits, allocate a number of damage points to that enemy fighter equal to the value of this ability, or allocate 6 damage points instead if a friendly fighter with the Hero (Hero) and Heralds of Kurnoth (Kurnoth's Heralds) runemarks is within 1" of that enemy fighter.Kurnoth's HeraldsScout[Double] Precision Volley: Another friendly fighter with the Heralds of Kurnoth (Kurnoth's Heralds) runemark can make a bonus move action of 3". Then, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the next missile attack action made by this fighter this activation and that attack action can target enemy fighters within 1" of any friendly fighters. If a friendly fighter with the Hero (Hero) and Heralds of Kurnoth (Kurnoth's Heralds) runemarks is within 1" of that enemy fighter, that attack action scores critical hits on a 5+.

content: Grown from ancient soulpods in the Realm of Death, Ylthari's Guardians were once diplomats and emissaries - now they are evergrteen with bitter wrath and seek only vengeance for their slain kin. Bladeborn fightersYlthari's Guardians are from Warhammer Underworlds, so adhere to Bladeborn rules.

content: Skaeth and his Kurnothi kin are merciless hunters of those who would dare despoil the wilderness, running their prey to ground before piercing their hearts with spears, arrows and hurled javelins. Bladeborn fightersSkaeth's Wild Hunt are from Warhammer Underworlds, so adhere to Bladeborn rules.

meta_description: What the Gloomspite Gitz lack in courage and skill, they make up for in numbers, cunning and spite. Wielding all
content: Optional RuleBattle Traits are optional rules that add additional flavour to a warband. All fighters must share this runemark to be eligible.There are also Battle Traits for each Grand Alliance. Trait RunemarkTraitGloomspite GitzGloomspite GitzDa Bad Moon Rises: After the initiative phase, each player whose warband has this battle trait can roll a dice, starting with the attacker. On a 2+, pick 1 of your opponent's or your own [doubles], [triples] or [quads]. Change the value of those ability dice to the result of the dice roll.

meta_description: What the Gloomspite Gitz lack in courage and skill, they make up for in numbers, cunning and spite. Wielding all
content: RunemarkReactionGloomspite GitzPile On: A fighter can make this reaction after an enemy fighter finishes a move action visible to this fighter and within 3" of this fighter. Pick another friendly fighter with the Gloomspite Gitz (Gloomspite Gitz) runemark. That fighter makes a bonus move action. After that move action, that fighter must be within 1" of the enemy fighter that made the move action.Gloomspite GitzScoutSpore Cloud: A fighter can make this reaction after a friendly fighter within 3" of this fighter is targeted by a missile attack action but before the hit rolls are made. Until the end of the round, friendly fighters are considered to be in cover while they are within 3" of this fighter.

meta_description: What the Gloomspite Gitz lack in courage and skill, they make up for in numbers, cunning and spite. Wielding all
content: RunemarkReactionGloomspite Gitz Grinkrak's LooncourtTuff Nut: A fighter can make this reaction after they are targeted by a melee attack action but before the hit rolls are made. Count up to two critical hits from that attack action as hits instead.

meta_description: What the Gloomspite Gitz lack in courage and skill, they make up for in numbers, cunning and spite. Wielding all
What the Gloomspite Gitz lack in courage and skill, they make up for in numbers, cunning and spite. Wielding all
content: RunemarkAbilityGloomspite Gitz[Double] Backstabbing Mob: A fighter can only use this ability if there is a visible friendly fighter within 1" of them. Until the end of this fighter's activation, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee attack actions made by this fighter.Gloomspite GitzTrapper[Double] Barbed Net: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 3" of this fighter and roll a dice. On a roll of 3+, until the end of the battle round, that fighter cannot make move actions or disengage actions.Gloomspite GitzScout[Double] Cant Catch Us!: A fighter can only use this ability if they have made one or more ranged attack actions this activation. This fighter makes a bonus move action of a number of inches equal to the value of this ability.Gloomspite GitzFerocious[Double] Slavering Jaws: A fighter can use this ability only if an enemy fighter has been taken down by an attack action made by them this activation. This fighter can make a bonus move action. If that move action ends within 1" of an enemy fighter, add 1 to this fighter’s Toughness characteristic for the rest of the battle round.Gloomspite GitzElite[Triple] Madcap Destruction: Roll a dice. This fighter can make a bonus move action up to double the value of the result. If this fighter finishes that move action within 1" of one or more visible enemy fighters, pick one of those enemy fighters. Allocate a number of damage points to that enemy fighter equal to the value of the result.Gloomspite GitzDestroyer[Triple] Spider Bite: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter and roll a number of dice equal to the value of this ability. For each roll of 4+, allocate 3 damage points to that fighter.Gloomspite GitzAgile[Triple] Go Dat Way!: Pick a friendly fighter with the Beast (Beast) runemark within 4" of this fighter. That fighter makes a bonus move action.Gloomspite Gitz[Quad] Sneaky Stab: This fighter makes a bonus move action. Then, they can make a bonus melee attack action. In addition, add the value of this ability to the damage points allocated to enemy fighters by each critical hit from that attack action.

meta_description: What the Gloomspite Gitz lack in courage and skill, they make up for in numbers, cunning and spite. Wielding all
content: RunemarkAbilityGloomspite GitzHeroPriest[Double] Speed of the Spider God: Until the end of the battle round, add 1 to the Move characteristic of friendly fighters with the Destroyer (Destroyer) runemark that start their activation within 6" of this fighter.Gloomspite GitzSentience[Double] Over Here, Ya Lug!: Pick a visible enemy fighter with the Monster (Monster) runemark that is within 6" of this fighter. Until the end of the battle round, that enemy fighter cannot end move actions further from this fighter.Gloomspite GitzBrute[Double] Mycophile's Pouch: Until the end of the battle round, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of friendly fighters with the Gloomspite Gitz (Gloomspite Gitz) faction runemark and either the Fly (Fly) runemark or the Beast (Beast) runemark while they are within 6" of this fighter.Gloomspite GitzHero[Triple] Stab 'Em Good: Until the end of the battle round, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee attack actions made by visible friendly fighters while they are within 6" of this fighter.Gloomspite GitzHeroMystic[Triple] Magic Spore Maws: Roll a dice for each visible enemy fighter within 3" of this fighter. On a roll of 3-4, allocate 1 damage point to the fighter being rolled for. On a roll of 5+, allocate a number of damage points to the fighter being rolled for equal to the value of this ability.Gloomspite GitzHeroChampion[Quad] I'm Da Boss; Now Stab 'Em Good!: Until the end of the battle round, add the value of this ability to the Attacks characteristic of melee attack actions made by friendly fighters with the Gloomspite Gitz (Gloomspite Gitz) faction runemark while they are within 6" of this fighter.

meta_description: What the Gloomspite Gitz lack in courage and skill, they make up for in numbers, cunning and spite. Wielding all
content: RunemarkAbilityGloomspite Gitz Grinkrak's Looncourt[Double] Enthusiastic Dubbin': Pick a visible friendly fighter with the Grinkrak's Looncourt runemark (Grinkrak's Looncourt) within 3" of this fighter that has not yet activated yet this battle round. That fighter suffers impact damage. You can activate that fighter immediately after this fighter's activation ends.Gloomspite Gitz Grinkrak's LooncourtHero[Double] Questin' Knight: Until the end of this fighter's activation, after an enemy fighter is taken down by a melee attack action made by this fighter, this fighter can make a bonus move action or a bonus attack action.Gloomspite Gitz Grinkrak's LooncourtIcon Bearer[Triple] Sound da Charge!: Until the end of the battle round, add half the value of this ability (rounding up) to the Move characteristic of friendly fighters while they make a move action that starts within 6" of this fighter.

meta_description: What the Gloomspite Gitz lack in courage and skill, they make up for in numbers, cunning and spite. Wielding all
content: RunemarkAbilityZarbag's GitzHero[Double] Face of Da Bad Moon: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 9" of this fighter that is within 1" of a friendly fighter. That enemy fighter must make a bonus disengage action. If they cannot do so, allocate D6 damage points to that enemy fighter instead.Zarbag's GitzFrenzied[Quad] Whirling Death: Allocate a number of damage points equal to the value of this ability to all visible enemy fighters within 3" of this fighter

meta_description: What the Gloomspite Gitz lack in courage and skill, they make up for in numbers, cunning and spite. Wielding all
content: RunemarkAbilityMollog's MobHero[Double] Hurl Jabbertoad: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 6" of this fighter and roll 2 dice. For each 4-5, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. For each 6, allocate a number of damage points equal to the value of this ability to that fighterMollog's MobHero[Double] Summon Stalagsquig: A fighter can only use this ability once per battle. Pick a point on a platform or the battlefield floor within 3" of this fighter that is more than 1" from all enemy fighters and set up the Stalagsquig marker. Allocate 2D6 damage points to the first enemy fighter to move within 1" of the marker, then remove the marker.Mollog's MobHero[Triple] Summon Spiteshroom: A fighter can only use this ability once per battle. Pick a point on a platform or the battlefield floor within 3" of this fighter that is more than 1" from all enemy fighters and set up the Spiteshroom marker. Subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic (to a minimum of 1) of attack actions made by enemy fighters while they are within 6" of the Spiteshroom marker. Fighters cannot end a move on the Spiteshroom marker.

meta_description: What the Gloomspite Gitz lack in courage and skill, they make up for in numbers, cunning and spite. Wielding all
content: RunemarkAbilityRippa's Snarlfangs[Double] Snarlfang's Jaws: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter and roll 2 dice. For each 4-5, allocate 1 damager point to that fighter. For each 6, allocate a number of damage points equal to the value of this ability to that fighter.Rippa's Snarlfangs[Quad] Ferocious Pounce: Until the end of this fighter's activation, the next time this fighter finishes a move action within 1" of an enemy fighter, pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter. Allocate a number of damage points equal to the value of this ability to that fighter.

meta_description: What the Gloomspite Gitz lack in courage and skill, they make up for in numbers, cunning and spite. Wielding all
content: RunemarkAbilityBorgit's BeastgrabbazHero[Double] Shank Dat Git: If there are no enemy trofees, pick a visible enemy fighter to be the trofee until they are taken down. In addition, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee attack actions made by friendly fighters with the Borgit’s Beastgrabbaz (Borgit's Beastgrabbaz) runemark that target the trofee.Borgit's Beastgrabbaz[Triple] Da Bait: Pick a friendly fighter with the Borgit’s Beastgrabbaz (Borgit's Beastgrabbaz) runemark wholly within 6" of and visible to a friendly fighter with the Borgit’s Beastgrabbaz (Borgit's Beastgrabbaz) and Hero (Hero) runemarks to be da bait for the rest of the battle round. Enemy fighters visible to and within a number of inches of da bait equal to the highest Range characteristic of any melee weapons they have must target da bait with all melee attack actions they make.Borgit's Beastgrabbaz[Quad] Gittish Taktikz: Pick an enemy fighter that is visible to this fighter. Allocate a number of damage points to that enemy fighter equal to twice the number of friendly fighters with the Borgit’s Beastgrabbaz (Borgit's Beastgrabbaz) runemark within 3" of them. If the target is the trofee, allocate a number of damage points to that enemy fighter equal to four times the number of friendly fighters with the Borgit’s Beastgrabbaz (Borgit's Beastgrabbaz) runemark within 3" of them instead.

meta_description: Released: March 2024.
content: When picking a warband from the Order of Azyr faction, the following rule is in addition to the bullet points under ‘The Warbands' in the core rules and ‘Step 1 – Choose Your Faction and Fighters' in the core rules. Each fighter with the Order of Azyr () runemark can only be included once in your warband.

meta_description: Released: March 2024.
content: Optional RuleBattle Traits are optional rules that add additional flavour to a warband. All fighters must share this runemark to be eligible.Order of Azyr do not have their own Battle Trait, but can used the Grand Alliance Order trait instead. Trait RunemarkTraitOrderOrderCourageous Defenders: When a friendly fighter with this battle trait makes the 'Take Cover' reaction, critical hits become hits on a roll of 3+ instead of 4+.

meta_description: Released: March 2024.
content: RunemarkReactionWarrior[Reaction] Grim Resolve: A fighter can make this reaction after they are targeted by an attack action but before the hit rolls are made. Remove D3 damage points allocated to this fighter.

meta_description: Released: March 2024.
content: RunemarkAbilityHexbane's HuntersBrute[Double] Explosive Bolts: After the next missile attack action made by this fighter in this activation, if it scored one or more hits, allocate a number of damage points to each other fighter within 3" of the target equal to half the value of this ability (rounding up).Frenzied[Double] Banishment: Until the end of this fighter’s activation, add 1 to the damage points allocated to enemy fighters by each hit and critical hit from missile attack actions made by this fighter.Hero[Triple] Brand of Righteousness: Until the end of this fighter's activation, add the value of this ability to the damage points allocated to enemy fighters by each critical hit from melee attack actions made by this fighter.Agile[Triple] Right Tool for the Job: Pick an enemy fighter within 3" of this fighter. Melee attack actions made by this fighter this activation that target that enemy fighter score a critical hit on a 5+.Scout[Triple] Give 'Em Both Barrels: This fighter makes a bonus ranged attack action. The Range characteristic for that attack action is double the value of this ability.Bulwark[Triple] They Will Break Upon My Shield: Until the end of the battle round, subtract the value of this ability from the damage points allocated to this fighter by each hit and critical hit from attack actions that target this fighter (to a minimum of 1).Terrifying[Triple] Secrets from the Shadows: Pick a [double], [triple] or [quad] from your opponent's ability dice. Roll a dice and add the value of this ability to the roll. On a 7+, that [double], [triple] or [quad] is discarded.Trapper[Triple] Tangle Them Up: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 3" of this fighter. Until the end of the battle round, subtract 2 from the Attacks characteristic (to a minimum of 1) of melee attack actions made by that fighter.Destroyer[Triple] Judgement: Until the end of this fighter’s activation, missile attack actions made by this fighter score a critical hit on a roll of 5+.Warrior[Quad] Hallowed Vengeance: A fighter can only use this ability if an enemy fighter's attack action took down a friendly fighter in the previous activation. Each friendly fighter with both the Warrior (Warrior) and the Order of Azyr () runemarks can make a bonus attack action that must target that fighter.

meta_description: The Idoneth emerge from their undersea kingdoms to raid for mortal souls – a vital resource that is required in vast
content: Source: White Dwarf #484 (out of print) Below you will find optional rules for Idoneth Deepkin warbands. These are excellent options for narrative and open play, as your Idoneth drag their victims into the briny depths in your games of Warcry. Before setup, if a player is using an Idoneth Deepkin warband, then that player can choose to arrive with the phantasmal tide. If they do so, the following rules apply during that battle.

meta_description: The Idoneth emerge from their undersea kingdoms to raid for mortal souls – a vital resource that is required in vast
content: Tidal Emergence: After deployment, 1 friendly fighter with the Idoneth Deepkin (Idoneth Deepkin) faction runemark can be removed from the battlefield and set up as if they were part of another friendly battle group, including a battle group that is in reserve. This fighter remains part of their original battle group for all other rules purposes. If more than 1 player is controlling an Idoneth Deepkin warband, those players roll off. The winner chooses the order in which the players use Tidal Emergence. Surging Tide: During the first battle round, if a friendly fighter with the Idoneth Deepkin (Idoneth Deepkin) faction runemark makes 2 move actions in the same activation, add 2 to the Move characteristic of that fighter for that second move action. Crashing Waves: During the second battle round, if a friendly fighter with the Idoneth Deepkin (Idoneth Deepkin) faction runemark makes 2 attack actions in the same activation, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that fighter for that second attack action. Ebbing Flow: During the third battle round, if a friendly fighter with the Idoneth Deepkin (Idoneth Deepkin) faction runemark makes 2 attack actions in the same activation, subtract 1 from the Strength characteristic of that fighter for that second attack action (to a minimum of 1). Fading Memories: In the fourth and subsequent battle rounds, friendly fighters with the Idoneth Deepkin ( ) faction runemark cannot use abilities or reactions while they are within 3" of 2 or more enemy fighters.

meta_description: The Idoneth emerge from their undersea kingdoms to raid for mortal souls – a vital resource that is required in vast
content: Optional RuleBattle Traits are optional rules that add additional flavour to a warband. All fighters must share this runemark to be eligible.There are also Battle Traits for each Grand Alliance. Trait RunemarkTraitIdoneth DeepkinIdoneth DeepkinPower of the Tides: In battle rounds 1 and 2, add 1 to the Move characteristic of friendly fighters with this battle trait. In battle rounds 3 and 4, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee attack actions made by friendly fighters with the battle trait.

meta_description: The Idoneth emerge from their undersea kingdoms to raid for mortal souls – a vital resource that is required in vast
content: RunemarkReactionIdoneth DeepkinFade From Memory: A fighter can make this reaction when an enemy fighter finishes a move action within 3" of them. If there is another friendly fighter visible to that enemy fighter and within range of at least one of that enemy fighter's melee weapons, for the rest of the battle round that enemy fighter cannot target this fighter.

meta_description: The Idoneth emerge from their undersea kingdoms to raid for mortal souls – a vital resource that is required in vast
The Idoneth emerge from their undersea kingdoms to raid for mortal souls – a vital resource that is required in vast
content: RunemarkAbilityIdoneth Deepkin[Double] Low Tide: A fighter can use this ability only if it is the first battle round. This fighter can make a bonus move action up to a number of inches equal to the value of this ability.Idoneth DeepkinMinion[Double] Sweeping Blow: Roll a dice for each visible enemy fighter within 2" of this fighter. On a roll of 5, allocate 1 damage point to the fighter being rolled for. On a roll of 6, allocate a number of damage points to the fighter being rolled for equal to the value of this ability.Idoneth DeepkinAgile[Double] Storm Fire: Until the end of this fighter's activation, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of missile attack actions made by this fighter.Idoneth DeepkinBulwark[Triple] Biovoltaic Barrier: Until the end of the battle round, count each critical hit from attack actions that target this fighter as a hit instead.Idoneth DeepkinBerserker[Quad] Biovoltaic Blast: Allocate a number of damage points equal to the value of this ability to all visible enemy fighters within 3" of this fighter.

meta_description: The Idoneth emerge from their undersea kingdoms to raid for mortal souls – a vital resource that is required in vast
content: RunemarkAbilityIdoneth DeepkinHeroMystic[Double] Riptide: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 12" of this fighter. Until the end of the battle round, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic (to a minimum of 1) of attack actions made by that fighter.Idoneth DeepkinHeroFrenzied[Double] Hangman's Knot: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 3" of this fighter and roll a dice. On a roll of 3+, until the end of the battle round, that fighter cannot make move actions or disengage actions.Idoneth DeepkinHeroChampion[Double] Storm of Blows: Add half the value of this ability (rounding up) to the Attacks characteristic of the next melee attack action made by this fighter in this activation.Idoneth DeepkinHeroPriest[Triple] Scryfish Shoal: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 10" of this fighter and roll 6 dice. For each roll of 4-5, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. For each roll of 6, allocate 2 damage points to that fighter.Idoneth DeepkinHeroSentience[Triple] Way of the Depths: Until the end of the battle round, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee attack actions made by this fighter and by visible friendly fighters with the Idoneth Deepkin (Idoneth Deepkin) faction runemark and either the Agile (Agile) or Minion (Minion) runemarks while they are within 6" of this fighter.Idoneth DeepkinHero[Triple] High Tide: A fighter can only use this ability if it is the third battle round. Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee attack actions made by friendly fighters while they are within 6" of this fighter.Idoneth DeepkinBrute[Triple] The Surging Sea: For the rest of the battle round, each time a friendly f ighter with the Idoneth Deepkin (Idoneth Deepkin) runemark within 6" of this fighter makes a move action, you can add 2 to their Move characteristic for that action.Idoneth DeepkinTerrifying[Triple] Whirlpool’s Fury: For the rest of the battle round, visible enemy fighters within 3" of this fighter cannot make disengage actions while they are within 3" of this fighter. In addition, subtract 1 from the damage points allocated to friendly fighters by each hit from attack actions made by those enemy fighters (to a minimum of 1).

meta_description: The Idoneth emerge from their undersea kingdoms to raid for mortal souls – a vital resource that is required in vast
content: RunemarkAbilityElathain's SoulraidHero[Double] Soulnet: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 3" of this fighter and roll a dice. On a 3+, that fighter cannot make move actions or disengage actions until the end of the battle round.Elathain's SoulraidTrapper[Triple] Riptide Harpoon: This fighter makes a bonus attack action. After that attack action, the fighter targeted by that attack action makes a bonus move action directly towards this fighter, as if they were jumping, a number of inches equal to the value of this ability.

meta_description: The Idoneth emerge from their undersea kingdoms to raid for mortal souls – a vital resource that is required in vast
content: RunemarkReactionBeastInk Jet: A fighter can make this reaction after they are targeted by a melee attack action but before the hit rolls are made. For each hit roll from that attack action that misses, after that attack action is resolved, you can move this fighter up to 2". In addition, if all of the hit rolls missed, that enemy fighter cannot make attack actions until the end of the battle round.

meta_description: The Idoneth emerge from their undersea kingdoms to raid for mortal souls – a vital resource that is required in vast
content: RunemarkAbilityMinion[Double] Hurl Lanmari Blade: Add the value of this ability to the Range characteristic of the next melee attack action made by this fighter this activation. After that attack action, this fighter cannot make melee attack actions for the rest of this activation.Hero[Triple] Hammertide: Pick a corner of the battlefield and draw a straight line 1mm wide between the centre of this fighter's base and that corner. Enemy fighters whose base touches that line cannot jump, fly or climb until the end of this battle round. In addition, roll a number of dice equal to the value of this ability for each such enemy fighter. Allocate 1 damage point to that fighter for each roll of 3+.Beast[Quad] Crushing Wrap: A fighter can only use this ability before it would make a melee attack action. Roll 8 dice. For each roll of 3+, add 1 to this fighter's Strength characteristic for that attack action and allocate 2 damage points to the target of that attack action. If the target is taken out of action, the melee attack action has no effect.

content: Elathain's companions are a disparate sort, the Akhelian knight Fuirann battling alongside the Namarti Tammael and the enchanged bond-beasts Duinclaw and Spinefin. Together, however, they fight as one to claim the souls needed for the survival of Idoneth. Bladeborn fightersElathain's Soulraid are from Warhammer Underworlds, so adhere to Bladeborn rules.

meta_description: The Lumineth Realm-lords are paragons of martial excellence, compensating for their limited numbers with
content: Optional RuleBattle Traits are optional rules that add additional flavour to a warband. All fighters must share this runemark to be eligible.There are also Battle Traits for each Grand Alliance. Trait RunemarkTraitLumineth RealmlordsLumineth Realm-lordsAetherquartz Reserves: At the start of the first battle round, each player whose warband has this battle trait can pick a friendly fighter. That fighter has an aetherquartz reserve. Once per battle, that fighter can use their aetherquartz reserve. When they do so, the next time that fighter uses an ability, you can treat one [double] you have as a [triple], or one [triple] you have as a [quad].

meta_description: The Lumineth Realm-lords are paragons of martial excellence, compensating for their limited numbers with
content: RunemarkReactionLumineth RealmlordsBlinding Brilliance: A fighter can make this reaction after they are targeted by a missile attack action but before the hit rolls are made. After the hit rolls have been made, roll a dice for each critical hit. On a roll of 4+, that critical hit becomes a hit instead.

meta_description: The Lumineth Realm-lords are paragons of martial excellence, compensating for their limited numbers with
The Lumineth Realm-lords are paragons of martial excellence, compensating for their limited numbers with
content: RunemarkAbilityLumineth RealmlordsWarrior[Double] Shining Company: A fighter can only use this ability if there are 2 or more other friendly fighters with both the Lumineth Realm-lords (Lumineth Realmlords) faction runemark and the Warrior (Warrior) runemark within 1" of this fighter. Until the end of the battle round, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic (to a minimum of 1) of attack actions made by enemy fighters while they target a fighter within 1" of this fighter.Lumineth RealmlordsBrute[Double] Mountain Stance: Until the end of the battle round, subtract 1 from the damage points allocated by each hit and critical hit (to a minimum of 1) from attack actions that target this fighter.Lumineth RealmlordsBerserker[Double] Go Where the Wind Blows: Add half the value of this ability (rounding up) to this fighter's Move characteristic for their next move action in this activation.Lumineth RealmlordsAgile[Triple] Move Like the Wind: Until the end of this fighter's activation, this fighter can finish disengage actions within 1" of enemy fighters.Lumineth RealmlordsMount[Triple] Lances of the Dawn: Until the end of this fighter's activation, the next time this fighter finishes a move action within 1" of an enemy fighter, pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter. Allocate a number of damage points equal to the value of this ability to that fighter.Lumineth RealmlordsFrenzied[Quad] Perfect Strike: This fighter makes a bonus attack action. In addition, add the value of this ability to the damage points allocated to enemy fighters by each critical hit from that attack action.

meta_description: The Lumineth Realm-lords are paragons of martial excellence, compensating for their limited numbers with
content: RunemarkAbilityLumineth RealmlordsHeroTrapper[Double] Moonfire Flask: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 6" of this fighter and roll 2 dice. For each roll of 4-5, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. For each roll of 6, allocate a number of damage points equal to the value of this ability to that fighter.Lumineth RealmlordsHeroElite[Double] Realmscribe: Pick a point on the battlefield within 9" of this fighter and place a special token there. Until the end of the battle round, subtract 1 from the damage points allocated by each critical hit from attack actions that target friendly fighters while they are within 6" of the centre of that token.Lumineth RealmlordsHeroDestroyer[Double] Lone Agent: A fighter can only use this ability if there are no other friendly fighters within 6" of this fighter. This fighter makes a bonus move action.Lumineth RealmlordsHeroScout[Triple] Sharp-eyed Scryhawk: Pick an enemy fighter within 20" of this fighter. Until the end of the battle round, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of attack actions that target that fighter.Lumineth RealmlordsHeroTerrifying[Triple] Emotional Transference: Pick a visible friendly fighter with the Lumineth Realm-lords (Lumineth Realmlords) faction runemark that has 1 or more damage points allocated to them and that is within 12" of this fighter. Then, pick a visible enemy fighter within 12" of this fighter. Roll a number of dice equal to the number of damage points allocated to that friendly fighter. For each 4+, allocate 1 damage point to that enemy fighter.Lumineth RealmlordsHero Mystic[Quad] Gravitic Redirection: Allocate D3 damage points to all visible enemy fighters within 6" of this fighter (roll for each). In addition, until the end of the battle round, halve the Move characteristic (rounding up) of all fighters while they make a move action that starts within 6" of this fighter.

meta_description: The Lumineth Realm-lords are paragons of martial excellence, compensating for their limited numbers with
content: RunemarkAbilityMyari's PurifiersHero[Triple] Dazzling Light: Until the end of the battle round, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic (to a minimum of 1) of attack actions made by enemy fighters while they are within 6" of this fighter

meta_description: The Lumineth Realm-lords are paragons of martial excellence, compensating for their limited numbers with
content: Myari's Purifiers epitomise different aspects of the Lumineth way of war. Bahannar cleaves to the Alarith tradition, whilst Senaela is an expert archer and Ailenn, as a Bladelord, has a near-supernatural mastery over the arts of the sword. Bladeborn fightersMyari's Purifiers are from Warhammer Underworlds, so adhere to Bladeborn rules.

meta_description: Empowered by the celestial storm and armed with the mightiest heavens-forged weapons, the Stormcast Eternals
content: Optional RuleBattle Traits are optional rules that add additional flavour to a warband. All fighters must share this runemark to be eligible.There are also Battle Traits for each Grand Alliance. Trait RunemarkTraitStormcast Eternals: Sacrosanct ChamberStormcast Eternals: Thunderstrike StormcastsStormcast Eternals: Vanguard Auxiliary ChamberStormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberStormcast EternalsScions of the Storm: After deployment, you can pick a friendly fighter with this battle trait. If that fighter is on the battlefield, remove them from the battlefield. At the start of the second battle round onwards, starting with the attacker, you can place that fighter on the battlefield more than 5" from each enemy fighter and more than 3" from each objective and treasure token.

meta_description: Empowered by the celestial storm and armed with the mightiest heavens-forged weapons, the Stormcast Eternals
content: RunemarkReactionStormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberThunderous Departure: A fighter can make this reaction when they are targeted by a melee attack action, after the damage is totalled but before it is allocated to this fighter, if it is enough for this fighter to be taken down. Allocate D6 damage points to their attacker. Fighters with the Beast (Beast) runemark or both the Scout (Scout) and Fly (Fly) runemarks cannot make this reaction.

meta_description: Empowered by the celestial storm and armed with the mightiest heavens-forged weapons, the Stormcast Eternals
Empowered by the celestial storm and armed with the mightiest heavens-forged weapons, the Stormcast Eternals
content: RunemarkAbilityStormcast Eternals: Warrior Chamber[Double] Furious Avengers: A fighter can only use this ability if there is another friendly fighter within 6" of this fighter with 1 or more damage points allocated to them. This fighter makes a bonus move action.Stormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberWarrior[Double] Lay Low the Tyrants: Until the end of this fighter's activation, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee attack actions made by this fighter that target an enemy fighter with a Wounds characteristic of 15 or more.Stormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberBulwark[Double] Sigmarite Shield Bash: Until the end of this fighter's activation, the next time this fighter finishes a move action within 1" of an enemy fighter, pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter and roll a dice. On a roll of 3+, allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.Stormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberFly[Double] Wings of Divine Life: Add 3 to this fighter's Move characteristic for their next move action in this activation.Stormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberBeast[Triple] Darting Attack: This fighter makes a bonus attack action. Then, they can make a bonus disengage action.Stormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberBrute[Quad] Earth-shattering Blow: This fighter makes a bonus attack action. In addition, add half the value of this ability (rounding up) to the damage points allocated to enemy fighters by each hit and critical hit from that attack action.

meta_description: Empowered by the celestial storm and armed with the mightiest heavens-forged weapons, the Stormcast Eternals
content: RunemarkAbilityStormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberHeroChampion[Double] Warcloak's Storm Magic: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 6" of this fighter and roll 2 dice. For each roll of 4-5, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. For each roll of 6, allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.Stormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberHero[Double] Staunch Defender: Until the end of the battle round, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of friendly fighters while they are within 6" of this fighter.Stormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberHeroBerserker[Double] Lantern of Abjuration: Until the end of the battle round, subtract 1 from the value of abilities (to a minimum of 1) used by visible enemy fighters while they are within 9" of this fighter.Stormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberHeroDestroyer[Triple] Battle-horn Thunderblast: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 12" of this fighter that is on a platform. Roll a dice for that fighter and for each other enemy fighter within 6" of that fighter. On a roll of 4+, allocate 3 damage points to the fighter being rolled for.Stormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberHero Mystic[Triple] Warding Lantern: Until the end of the battle round, subtract 1 from the damage points allocated by each hit and critical hit (to a minimum of 1) from attack actions that target friendly fighters while they are within 6" of this fighter.Stormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberHeroPriest[Triple] Lightning Storm: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 12" and roll a number of dice equal to the value of this ability. For each roll of 2+, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter.Stormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberHeroIcon Bearer[Quad] Tempest Winds: Until the end of the battle round, add the value of this ability to the Move characteristic of friendly fighters while they make a move action that starts within 12" of this fighter.

meta_description: Empowered by the celestial storm and armed with the mightiest heavens-forged weapons, the Stormcast Eternals
content: RunemarkAbilityStormcast Eternals: Warrior ChamberSteelheart's Champions[Double] Heroic Guard: Until the end of the battle round, subtract 1 from the damage points allocated by each hit and critical hit (to a minimum of 1) from attack actions that target this fighter.

content: Severin Steelheart and his loyal warriors have fought at the forefront of the Gon-King's wars since the Gates of Azyr first opened, earning countless battle honours. Their fellowship is unbreakable, and there are few foes they cannot defeat. Bladeborn fightersSteelheart's Champions are from Warhammer Underworlds, so adhere to Bladeborn rules.

meta_description: Released: October 2020, Catacombs boxed set (Warcry first edition). Refreshed August 2022.
content: Optional RuleBattle Traits are optional rules that add additional flavour to a warband. All fighters must share this runemark to be eligible.There are also Battle Traits for each Grand Alliance. Trait RunemarkTraitKhainite ShadowstalkersKhainite ShadowstalkersSwarming Shadows: At the end of each battle round, each player whose warband has this battle trait can pick two friendly fighters that are within 9” of each other, more than 3” from each enemy fighter and are not carrying treasure. Place each friendly fighter in the position the other fighter was in when they were picked.

meta_description: Released: October 2020, Catacombs boxed set (Warcry first edition). Refreshed August 2022.
content: RunemarkAbilityKhainite Shadowstalkers[Reaction] Slip Between Shadows: A fighter can make this reaction when an enemy fighter finishes a move action within 3" of them. Note the distance between this fighter and the enemy fighter that made the move action. Remove this fighter from the battlefield and then set this fighter up on a platform or the battlefield floor no further from the enemy fighter that made the move action.Khainite Shadowstalkers[Double] Shadow Leap: Until the end of this fighter's activation, this fighter can fly when making move actions.Khainite ShadowstalkersWarrior[Double] Cursed Darts: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 9" of this fighter and roll 2 dice. For each roll of 4+, allocate 2 damage points to that fighter. In addition, if either dice rolls a 6, until the end of the battle round, halve the Move characteristic of that fighter (rounding up).Khainite ShadowstalkersBerserker[Double] Instrument of Khaine: A fighter can only use this ability if an enemy fighter has been taken down by an attack action made by them this activation. This fighter makes a bonus move action or a bonus attack action.Khainite ShadowstalkersMystic[Triple] Harness Shadow: Until the end of the battle round, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic (to a minimum of 1) of attack actions made by enemy fighters while they target a fighter within 3" of this fighter.Khainite Shadowstalkers[Triple] Dance of Death: Until the end of this fighter's activation, this fighter can finish disengage actions within 1" of enemy fighters.Khainite ShadowstalkersHero[Quad] Ensnaring Darkness: Either allocate a number of damage points equal to the value of this ability to all visible enemy fighters within 3" of this fighter, or allocate 3 damage points to this fighter and a number of damage points equal to the value of this ability to all visible enemy fighters within 6" of this fighter.

meta_description: Released: October 2020, Catacombs boxed set (Warcry first edition). Refreshed August 2022.
content: infoThe Khainite Shadowstalkers box contains: 1x Shroud Queen 1x Slaughtershade, with a choice of Shadow whip or Umbral spear 2x Darkflame Warlocks, who can be armed with either Doomfire rings or Repeater crossbows 5x Shroudblades, who can be armed with either Umbral spears or Cursed swords

meta_description: The cold-blooded Seraphon are eternal enemies of Chaos and show no mercy to those who would subvert the Great
content: Optional RuleBattle Traits are optional rules that add additional flavour to a warband. All fighters must share this runemark to be eligible.There are also Battle Traits for each Grand Alliance. Trait RunemarkTraitSeraphonSeraphonAfter you pick your warband, pick either Coalesced or Starborne and gain the corresponding battle trait listed below: Coalesced: Friendly fighters with this battle trait can add a 1 to the value of any [triple] spent to use the Tearing bite ability, to a maximum of 6. Starborne: Fighters with this battle trait can make the “Starborn” reaction when they are targeted by melee and ranged attack actions.

meta_description: The cold-blooded Seraphon are eternal enemies of Chaos and show no mercy to those who would subvert the Great
content: RunemarkReactionSeraphonStarborn: A fighter can make this reaction after they are targeted by a melee attack action but before the hit rolls are made. Count up to two critical hits from that attack action as hits instead.

meta_description: The cold-blooded Seraphon are eternal enemies of Chaos and show no mercy to those who would subvert the Great
The cold-blooded Seraphon are eternal enemies of Chaos and show no mercy to those who would subvert the Great
content: RunemarkAbilitySeraphonMinion[Double] Nimble Retreat: A fighter can only use this ability if they are within 1" of an enemy fighter. This fighter makes a bonus disengage action.SeraphonDestroyer[Double] Voracious Appetite: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter and roll a number of dice equal to the value of this ability. For each roll of 4+, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter.SeraphonTrapper[Double] Hunting Pack: Pick a visible friendly fighter with the Beast (Beast ) runemark within 2" of this fighter. That fighter makes a bonus attack action.SeraphonBrute[Double] Brutal Blows: A fighter can only use this ability if they are within 1" of 2 or more enemy fighters. Add half the value of this ability (rounding up) to the Attacks characteristic of the next melee attack action made by this fighter.SeraphonSentience[Double] Spawn of Sotek: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee attack actions made by this fighter this activation while 1 or more endangered friendly fighters are within 6" of them. A friendly fighter is endangered if it has the Minion (Minion) runemark and is: within 1" of 1 or more enemy fighters and/or has 1 or more damage points allocated to them.SeraphonMinionMount[Double] Raptadon Tactics: If this fighter has a weapon with the Ranged Weapon (Ranged) runemark on their fighter profile, this fighter makes a bonus move action of a number of inches equal to the value of this ability. Otherwise, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this fighter's melee attack actions until the end of their activation.SeraphonFrenzied[Triple] Meteoric Barrage: Until the end of this fighter's activation, the next time this fighter finishes a move action within 1" of an enemy fighter, pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter. Allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.SeraphonWarrior[Triple] Tearing Bite: Add the value of this ability to the damage points allocated by each hit and critical hit from the next melee attack action made by this fighter in this activation.SeraphonWarriorMount[Triple] Predatory Leap: This fighter makes a bonus move action up to 3" and can fly as part of that move action. After this fighter finishes that move, you can pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter. If you do so, allocate a number of damage points equal to half the value of this ability (rounding up) to that fighter.Seraphon[Quad] Wrath of the Old Ones: Until the end of the battle round, add half the value of this ability (rounding up) to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee attack actions made by this fighter.

meta_description: The cold-blooded Seraphon are eternal enemies of Chaos and show no mercy to those who would subvert the Great
content: RunemarkAbilitySeraphonHeroPriest[Double] Tide of Serpents: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 8" of this fighter and roll a number of dice equal to the value of this ability. For each roll of 4-5, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. For each roll of 6, allocate 3 damage points to that fighter.SeraphonHero[Double] Cold-blooded Commander: A fighter can only use this ability if an enemy fighter has been taken down by an attack action made by them this activation. This fighter makes a bonus move action or a bonus attack action.SeraphonHero Agile[Double] Lead from On High: Add 3 to this fighter's Move characteristic for their next move action in this activation.SeraphonHeroMystic[Triple] Lords of Space and Time: Pick another friendly fighter with the Seraphon (Seraphon) faction runemark that is within 12" of this fighter. Remove that fighter from the battlefield, then set that fighter up on a platform or the battlefield floor, wholly within a number of inches of this fighter equal to the value of this ability.SeraphonHeroIcon Bearer[Quad] Revivifying Energies: Remove a number of damage points up to the value of this ability allocated to each friendly fighter within 6" of this fighter.

meta_description: The cold-blooded Seraphon are eternal enemies of Chaos and show no mercy to those who would subvert the Great
content: RunemarkAbilityThe Starblood StalkersScout[Double] Chameleon Ambush: This fighter can use this abilit only if there are no visible enemy fighters within 12" of this fighter. This fighter can make a bonus move action.The Starblood StalkersHero[Triple] Imbue With Azyrite Energy: Until the end of the battle round, add 1 to the Move and Toughness characteristics of friendly fighters while they are within 9" of this fighter.

meta_description: The cold-blooded Seraphon are eternal enemies of Chaos and show no mercy to those who would subvert the Great
content: RunemarkAbilityJaw's of Itzl[Double] Sotek’s Venomites: If no enemy fighter has a Sotek’s Venomites token, pick a visible enemy fighter within 6" of this fighter and give them a Sotek’s Venomites token for the rest of the battle. While that enemy fighter has that token, if a melee attack action that targets that enemy fighter scores any critical hits, allocate D3 damage points to that enemy fighter. If a fighter with a Sotek’s Venomites token is removed from the battlefield, remove that Sotek’s Venomites from the battlefield.Jaw's of ItzlBulwark[Double] Dedicated Guardian: Until the end of the battle round, friendly fighters with the Hero (Hero) runemark and the Jaws of Itzl (Jaw's of Itzl) runemark cannot be targeted while they are within 1" of this fighter.Jaw's of ItzlHero[Quad] Sunblooded Quickening: Until the start of this fighter’s next activation, add 3 to the Move characteristic of visible friendly fighters with the Seraphon (Seraphon) runemark that do not have the Mount (Mount) or Fly (Fly) runemarks and that start their activation within 6" of this fighter.

content: The Starblood Stalkers are a pack of masterful skink hunters, pursuing their foes into even the densest terrain before striking. Their cunning, bolstered by the camoflauge of the Chameleon Skink Otapatl, has seen them take even the most cautious enemies by surprise. Bladeborn fightersThe Starblood Stalkers are from Warhammer Underworlds, so adhere to Bladeborn rules.
